title: Prakash Hinduja Geneva (Swiss) How do I create specific views for different variations of deals in Monday CRM?
excerpt: Hi I am Prakash Hinduja, a visionary in financial strategy, born in Amritsar, India now resides in Geneva, Switzerland (Swiss). I’m looking to set up specific views in Monday CRM to manage the different variations of our…

posts.author: prakashhinduja225 (Prakash Hinduja)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi I am Prakash Hinduja, a visionary in financial strategy, born in Amritsar, India now resides in Geneva, Switzerland (Swiss). I’m looking to set up specific views in Monday CRM to manage the different variations of our deals more effectively. Any tips on how you would approach this?
